description: Embrace the spirit of Pride Month with our vibrant email template that beautifully combines fashion and activism. This limited edition layout features a dark mode that accentuates the rainbow theme, reflecting the diversity of the LGBTQ+ community. Use it to announce your month-long sale or promotion, or to rally support for a fundraiser or donation drive. It's the perfect way to celebrate pride, inclusivity, and individuality. Whether you're promoting a new fashion line or raising awareness for a cause, this template allows you to do so with style and substance.
short_description: Celebrate diversity with our Pride Month email template. Perfect for promoting sales, launching a limited edition fashion line, or supporting LGBTQ+ causes. Embrace inclusivity, start fundraisers, and rally donations with our vibrant, dark mode design. Make every month a Pride month.

designer.description: UX/UI Designer with great creativity and artistic talent delivering high-impact design experiences, marketing solutions and digital projects. Exceptional collaborative and interpersonal skills; solid team player with well-developed written and verbal communication abilities. Highly skilled in deadline and project management, and working within budget requirements. Experience working for international companies (USA, Latin America, Europe). Looking for the best collaboration opportunities to materialize your ideas and help you grow your business!

Shop Now
 
 
 

In celebration of Pride Month, this year we’re donating $100,000 to 

THE ATTIC YOUTH CENTER

The Attic Youth Center creates opportunities for LGBTQ youth to develop into healthy, independent, civic-minded adults within a safe and supportive community, and promotes the acceptance of LGBTQ youth in society.
